text: I am surrounded by the clinical precision of glass and steel, immersed in a space dedicated to "R+D"—the restless pursuit of new knowledge. The words on the wall speak of adaptation, evolution, and coexistence with intelligent machines. Everything feels meticulously designed for progress, yet there’s a quiet tension between human warmth and the cool, calculated efficiency. I feel curious, but also a little alienated by the relentless forward momentum. What role do I wish to play in this dance between invention and belonging?
